description: Find Dr. Chen's body and retrieve the research data drive.

dialogue.offer: Dr. Chen was carrying the data drive when he went missing. Find him and bring it back.
dialogue.accepted: Be careful. The Lifeform is still out there.
dialogue.advice: Check the containment chamber on the lower level.
dialogue.success: You found it! This data might save us all.
dialogue.success_lie: That's not the data drive. Keep looking.
dialogue.failure: You couldn't find it? We're running out of time.
